Headline: Temporary Reroute at 87th/Exchange
ShortDescription: #87 buses are temporarily rerouted via 87th, Yates, 83rd, Commercial and 87th due to police activity near 87th/Exchange.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#87 buses are temporarily rerouted via 87th, Yates, 83rd, Commercial and 87th due to police activity near 87th/Exchange.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Temporary Southbound Reroute near 76th/Pulaski
ShortDescription: Southbound #53 buses are temporarily rerouted via Pulaski, 79th, Cicero, 76th and the Ford City terminal due to a street blockage.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Southbound #53 Pulaski buses are temporarily rerouted via Pulaski, 79th, Cicero, 76th and the Ford City terminal due to a street blockage.

Northbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Temporary Westbound Reroute near 76th/Pulaski
ShortDescription: Westbound #67 67th-69th-71st buses are temporarily rerouted via 71st, Pulaski, 76th, Cicero, 76th and the Ford City terminal due to a street blockage.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Westbound #67 67th-69th-71st buses are temporarily rerouted via 71st, Pulaski, 76th, Cicero, 76th and the Ford City terminal due to a street blockage.

Eastbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Green and Pink Line Delays
ShortDescription: Some Green and Pink Line trains are operating with residual delays after an earlier raised bridge at the Chicago River, downtown Service is resuming.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Some Green and Pink Line trains are operating with residual delays after an earlier raised bridge at the Chicago River, downtown.

Some trains and platforms may be busier than usual as crews work to restore normal service.

Trains are moving and normal service is being restored.

Allow extra travel time.
